questions.question: A shipping company recorded delivery times (in minutes) for a week: $23, 19, 31, 27, 22$. What is the stem in a stem-and-leaf plot for these times?
In a stem-and-leaf plot for traffic flow data, the stem is $40$ and the leaves are $2, 5, 8$. What are the actual data values?
What does the leaf $7$ represent in the stem-and-leaf plot with stem $50$?
The stem-and-leaf plot shows travel times (in hours) for a set of trips: $3 | 2, 5, 9$. What is the median travel time?
Which data set has a stem-and-leaf plot with the most leaves?
The following data represents shipping times: $10.2, 10.5, 10.8$. Which is the correct stem-and-leaf plot?
Which data set would be best represented by a stem-and-leaf plot?

options.A: A small set of distinct values
options.B: A large set of measurements with many repeated values
options.C: A set of exam scores with a clear pass/fail threshold
options.D: A set of categorical data with no natural ordering
options.E: A set of numerical data with many decimal places

questions.question: A delivery company recorded package weights (in pounds): $23.1, 19.5, 27.8$. How would the stem-and-leaf plot be constructed?

options.C: Split after the first two digits

questions.question: Create a stem-and-leaf plot for the following set of data: $14.2, 15.1, 14.9, 16.3, 15.7$. Use $14$ and $15$ as stems. Calculate the median of the dataset.
Given a stem-and-leaf plot: $40 | 2, 5, 8$ and $50 | 1, 3, 6$, calculate the mean and range of the data represented. Show all work and explain your reasoning.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Ensure students understand the concept of stem-and-leaf plots before attempting complex problems.
Tip 2: Encourage students to use real-world examples, such as transportation data, to practice constructing stem-and-leaf plots.
Tip 3: Remind students to consider the distribution of data and potential outliers when interpreting stem-and-leaf plots.
Chef's Tips: Stem-and-leaf plots are useful for visualizing the distribution of data and can be applied to various fields such as transportation, logistics, and more.
